name: @artale/pi-arena
description_en: Model benchmarking with domain-aware hallucination tracking, per-model leaderboards, and task templates. Track speed, quality, and pass rate across coding, reasoning, and general knowledge.
description_zh: 模型基准测试，带有领域感知的幻觉跟踪、每模型排行榜和任务模板。跟踪编码、推理和一般知识方面的速度、质量和通过率
